---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: 'feat: <short description>'
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs discussion']
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the problem or limitation this feature would solve.
     Focus on the why, not the what. -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you're proposing. Be as specific as possible. -->

## Alternative Approaches Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds? Why is your approach preferred? -->

## Affected Area

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Server (Express / Mongoose)
- [ ] Client (React / UI)
- [ ] Authentication (Clerk integration)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD / Tooling
- [ ] Other: ___

## Scope & Complexity Estimate

<!-- Optional but helpful for prioritization -->

- [ ] Small — isolated change, low risk
- [ ] Medium — touches multiple files or components
- [ ] Large — significant architectural change, needs design discussion

## Additional Context

<!-- Add any mockups, diagrams, links to similar implementations, or other relevant context. -->
